name: Defender's Squad: The Last Ride
short_description: Defender's Squad is a sci-fi vertical scrolling shooter 2D that combines 7 different levels. Play Solo and pick one of the 3 ships to kill enemies and save the earth from aliens.
detailed_description:
In a dystopian future, humans have colonized space, and Created the biggest Empire EVER made. A few days before when the capital of the Empire moved to another planet, the milky way was attacked by the enemy.

Our Heroes left from the sector 317 and after defeating some enemies they received the mission: To save the earth.








From that point, as the Hero, you must to complete the mission by shooting different types of enemy ships, cannons and bosses on your way to earth. But be aware that supplies can be scarce and you need to survive otherwise everything will be destroyed.

Defender's Squad: The last Ride is a shoot'em up, space ship game inspired in classics like Space Invaders, with top-down view, vertical move, and original assets.

On Defender's Squad: the Last Ride you can expect a clean and easy gameplay, different backgrounds, 7 different enemy ships, and bosses along the levels.

By shooting and destroying enemies you can get power ups to help you in your journey:
  • Power ups: get stronger shoots
  • Shields: have a temporary protective shield to get through hard times
  • Special shoots: call your squad to give you a hand

Get to know our Heros

They have different characteristics. And they carry different special shooting. You don't know what to choose? Test each one and decide which better fits your style. What do you want? More power or more protection? Better shooting or being faster?
  • Rogue: Major Finn
  • Bomber: Captain Bob
  • Support: Lieutenant Ryan

Levels and Backgrounds:
Different levels for you to play and enjoy.

Enemies:
Many different and original enemies which are introduced in different levels.

Bosses:
Original bosses for you to beat.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
